name: Knights College
short_description: KnightsCollege is a kemono visual novel set in the Knight College, where elite knight candidates live. In this game, every choice is presented as a card, and the protagonist lives in the dormitory while collecting cards.
detailed_description:
Update 2022/09/10
・Korean, French and Vietnamese have been added.

Announcement
・Gameplay streaming of Knights College is allowed up to chapter 3.
　And, it is prohibited to stream after chapter 4.
・This is a story-driven visual novel. Please be careful not to spoil your review or impression.
・This game runs on Windows 10 (64bit).

Story


One day, Argo, a young man living a leisurely life in a fishing village in the countryside, receives a letter of recommendation from the Knights College of his dreams. Not knowing why he was recommended, he enrolls and spends his days with his fellow knight candidates.


Card


In KnightsCollege, all conversations and movements are done through card-based selection. Each time you get a new card, it unlocks a conversation, opens up a different route, or increases your likability with the character.


Life at the Knights College


Lectures : Argo will learn many things from the instructor.


Training : Argo trains swords and guns.


Bath : At the end of the day, you can take a bath with your favorite character.


Events : Various events are waiting for the knight cadets, such as room exchange and out-of-college activities.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, French, Vietnamese, Korean
